text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I lost AGAIN?!

Hearing a scream, I race to the<n>arcade and find
Winning Ticket yelling<n>about something.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I just can't seem to win at this<n>motion control
game! And I'm<n>supposed to be good at physical<n>
stuff!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Those monsters are waytoo hard. Even the three of uscombined are no match for them.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, we got to play plenty today!<n>Should we
head back?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No! I can't quit now! I won't stop till I<n>beat it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh, can't we save it for another day?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No way! We ate an amazing parfait,bought a ton of stuff, and even rode aboat in the park! We had a blasttoday!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So I wanted to end the day on a<n>happy note! This
whole day should be<n>one huge, wonderful
memory!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Tickezo! You really inspired me just<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Then let's get back to it!

The trio lines up in front of the huge<n>game
monitor, and an intense battle<n>erupts the moment
a colossal dragon<n>appears.

text_block_list.name: Fierce Dragon
text_block_list.text: ROOOAAARRR!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My magic isn't working! ...Scarlet, it<n>went that
way!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Grr! I'll act as bait! Regroup while I<n>hold its
attention!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Don't you DARE touch Scarleeeet!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Take this! FULL POWER IMPAAAACT!

text_block_list.name: Fierce Dragon
text_block_list.text: GRAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why'd you save me? You could have<n>beaten it if
you left me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm not just gonna throw your life<n>away! Without
all three of us, it'd<n>never be a perfect memory!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I want all of us to smile when weremember today. That's what makingmemories is all about!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tickezo...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Let's take that monster<n>down
together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna make a perfect memory too!<n>Let's fight
to the very end!

With their hearts united as one, the<n>three of them
perfectly synchronize<n>their actions and beat the
game!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We did it! We won! Nothing can stop<n>us when
we're together!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Our teamwork is second to none!<n>I'm so
glad we toughed it out!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YEAH! We ruuule!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank yoouuu! I'll never forget thisfor as long as I live! This is the bestday ever!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Before we forget, how about we<n>take some
photo stickers?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Having a pic to rememberwould rock! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You really want to remember<n>how hard
you're crying right now?
choice_data_list: Why not take a second to compose yourself?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I want to, but the tears just keep<n>comiiing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You can cry all you want! I think<n>happy tears
make unforgettable<n>memories too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
WAAAAAH! Spe, you're so, so,<n>soooo
SWEEEET!

We take some pictures with Winning<n>Ticket's
eyes still red. Everyone's<n>emotions come out
clear as day,<n>making these some great photos!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooh, shall we go get a bite to eat? I'm<n>starving!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'll have two hamburger sets and<n>an extra
large nugget combo. Oh and...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow, Spe! I won't let you out-eat me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't even try to compete if I<n>were you. Her
stomach's like a black<n>hole.

Winning Ticket eats herself into a<n>food coma, and
we end up having to<n>skip the photo stickers.
